item.title: 7 persistent claims about abortion, fact-checked
item.description:
According to the Pew Research Center's polls, 37% of Americans want abortion illegal in all or most cases. But an even bigger fraction — around 6 in 10 Americans — think abortion should be legal in all or most cases
Current abortion rates are lower than what they were in 1973 and are now less than half what they were at their peak in the early 1980s, according to the Guttmacher Institute, a reproductive health research organization that supports abortion rights.
The annual number of deaths related to legal induced abortion has fluctuated from year to year since 1973. Data from 2013 to 2018 showed the national case-fatality rate for legal induced abortion was 0.41 deaths per 100,000 legal induced abortions.
Trans and nonbinary people have undergone abortions as well. The Guttmacher Institute estimates in 2017, an estimated 462 to 530 transgender or nonbinary individuals in the U.S. had abortions.
"Most abortions in 2019 took place early in gestation," according to the CDC. Nearly 93% of abortions were performed at less than 13 weeks' gestation. Abortion pills, which can typically be used up to 10 weeks into a pregnancy, made up 54% of abortions in 2020.
Researchers wrote that fetal awareness of pain requires "functional thalamocortical connections." Those thalamocortical fibers begin appearing between 23 and 30 weeks' gestational age, but the capacity for pain perception comes later.
The argument against abortion has frequently been based on religion. Data shows that the majority of people who get an abortion have some sort of religious affiliation, according to the most recent Guttmacher Institute data, from 2014. Sauce: https://www.npr.org/2022/05/06/1096676197/7-persistent-claims-about-abortion-fact-checked?fbclid=IwAR2rF7SDeIzimDMHLnRctMnLHzly8Dx28dyUwgJ_nKNhZ-2d1INsjhHsOfo Front Page Edit: Send this to your favorite Pro-Lifer!! JK...kinda ;) *insert troll laughter here*
item.dc:creator: DeniWen

item.title: How to tell me you're a jackass without telling me you're a jackass
item.description: What a dipshit Graham is. Yeah, Lindsey, better pay, better working conditions, management responding to workers instead of dismissing them, not wanting to pee in a bottle because you don't have time while driving the Amazon delivery truck to take break - that's all about politics. Looks like Republican Union Hating will continue unabashed. Thanks for the poll boost, Lindsey, there are elections coming up. https://gizmodo.com/amazon-labor-union-leader-puts-lindsey-graham-in-his-pl-1848887996

item.title: Fuck
item.description: Warning: Void Screaming ahead: TLDR : Am an American Citizen with a Uterus. I’m a woman. I have two kids. I’ve had two abortions. I am feeling fucked up about what is happening. I am reading articles and seeing people post here talking about voting, talking about how dystopian this is, but I have NO IDEA what we are actually going to do. The system is totally fucked worldwide, what is voting going to do at this point? Maxwell might walk now, her trial won’t even be released, yet everyone is fawning all over the LIVE STREAMED Depp trial? I feel like I’m surrounded by TOTALLY INSANITY. When I try to talk to my partner about this, the response is «why does what is happening in Louisiana impact you ». FUCK. Just shouting in the void because I don’t know what else to do. Please don’t tell me to fucking vote - I’m so angry at this fucked up government it almost feels like adding insult to injury. No investigation into January 6th, but let’s get those walls up around SCOTUS ASAP — and trust this is all working for the good of the people. FUUUUUCK. Then go vote like that’ll make ONE BIT OF DAMN DIFFERENCE. The ERA has STILL never been passed. Haven’t people been voting??? Yet here we sit on the precipice of reverting back to policies from the damn dark ages. If you read all this, thanks. Thanks to all the people with inseminating-parts trying to be compassionate to all us WOULD-BE GOD-DAMN INCUBATORS. This is fucking insanity. P.S. KEEP YOUR GOD DAMN CHRISTIAN IDEOLOGY OUT OF MY FUCKING PUSSY. Hail Satan.
item.dc:creator: beyondtheutmostboundsofhumanthought
